headline: Palantir’s FAA Win And Manifesto Reframe Long Term Government Risk Profile
summary: Palantir Technologies (NasdaqGS:PLTR) has secured a sole source Federal Aviation Administration data modernization contract, expanding its role in U.S. aviation infrastructure. The company has also emerged as a finalist for the SMART AI project, positioning its platforms for broader adoption across critical government systems. Separately, Palantir released a wide ranging policy manifesto advocating universal national service and reaffirming its focus on defense sector work. For investors...

headline: Palantir Unlocked the Secret to Massive Growth. Its Stock Is Deeply Mispriced
summary: In the AI era, companies have spent hundreds of billions chasing the next big model. Yet most still wrestle with the same problem: turning flashy technology into daily results that move the needle on revenue, costs, or decisions. Enterprise software budgets keep climbing through 2026, but the gap between pilot projects and scaled impact keeps ... Palantir Unlocked the Secret to Massive Growth. Its Stock Is Deeply Mispriced
